reasoning: The freeze value of 23.5% is an aggregated and efficient estimate for this question. Based on estimated annualized volatility (50-60%) and an assumed positive drift, the probability of touching a barrier perfectly aligns with the market's ~23.5% price. Thus, I will stay close to the market consensus of 0.235.
